message:
Remove dead stream fields, simplify getBuffer and parsePartialJson

- Remove error_offset from StreamState (set but never read)
- Remove root_value_start (already removed field, missed assignment)
- Simplify getBuffer → getBufferPtr (len was never used by caller)
- Fix stale doc comment mentioning removed path stack
- Remove unnecessary trim() allocation in parsePartialJson (empty string
  is falsy, whitespace-only correctly returns invalid→failed-parse)
- Remove redundant anyMatchOrBelow from simd.zig (already committed)
- stream.zig 263→257, index.ts 870→867, engine.wasm -7B
